# Project Context & Instructions

## Tech Stack

- Framework: python3

## Coding Standards

- Use python3 for all code.
- Use single file "blockchain.py" to contain all python code.

## Directory Structure

- `/src/blockchain`: server side code for blockchain implementation.

## Preferences

- Always include timeit function to measure execution time of critical functions (e.g., mining, chain validation).

## Anti-Patterns (What to avoid)
